title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 26 February 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.detail: PPL (Piramal) Pharma has come to almost its lowest point. He says hold here because pharma can act as a defensive counter to IT, where the impact is less than feared. Definitely hold as of now.

recommendations.note: Hold through Q4 results, then decide
recommendations.detail: Hold for this quarter's results. The Delhi/region hotels did well, so the quarter's result should be good. Decide whether to sell only post-results.

recommendations.note: Exit on any rally; do not average
recommendations.detail: Nothing positive; the company keeps making noise but hasn't delivered. Only the well-known promoter (Mr. Soota) supports its roughly Rs 5,000-6,000 crore valuation. Stock is near its 52-week low; exit on any rally and do not average.

recommendations.note: Hold; one of better oncology names
recommendations.detail: Hold as of now; it is one of the better companies in the oncology segment and recent news-driven activity is seen, so the loss should get covered. Negatives are a high PE and a weak last result (top line up, bottom line so-so). Reshuffle after Q4 if needed.

recommendations.note: Buy on dips around 320-330, not at current level
recommendations.detail: SMS (ESS ESS) shows extreme strength and is attempting 52-week highs. He repeatedly said buy whenever it came below 300. Do NOT buy at the current ~360 level; buy when it comes to around 320-330.

recommendations.note: Buy long-term (2-3 yr); watch US export fine print
recommendations.detail: They are the number-one producer of solar modules/panels with domestic demand, so he says buy for a 2-3 year horizon. Caution: a small hindrance to US exports; the company says it mostly assembles in India and has a US plant, limiting impact, but the US-government fine print must be watched. Averaging is acceptable.

recommendations.note: Hold; if Q4 good, exit on recovery to 450-500
recommendations.detail: Hyped at listing; a weak Q4 result pushed it to its 52-week low. Government-order revenues get added later, so if the fourth quarter is good the stock can recover to 450-500 levels. Hold here and exit on that recovery.
The stock is exactly at its support level now. He says definitely invest the planned Rs 50,000, no second thoughts.
Part of a viewer's long-term basket (DCB Bank, L&T, SBI, Jio Finance, Dr Reddy's Labs) mixing an infra company, a bank and an NBFC. He says continue existing holdings and definitely invest fresh.

Directly the stock is weak. The only positive is the brand portfolio and that it belongs to a large industrial group, so at some point it will perform. Hold for the group angle.
No need to sell in panic. Normally considered a good mid-cap IT company; in the current commotion, watch their strategy before deciding. He is not advising a hurried exit.

recommendations.note: Don't sell; doing something in infra
recommendations.detail: He is doing something, at least playing a bit in infrastructure, so don't sell it at all. No need to exit in a hurry.

recommendations.note: Wait and watch; no rush to buy
recommendations.detail: It has corrected badly from its highs (more than 5 percent off, down to about half). At this level he would wait and watch; there is no need to buy in a hurry.

recommendations.note: Steady but won't deliver outperforming gains
recommendations.detail: Like other housing-finance names it gives steady returns, but for outperforming gains it definitely will not deliver. Should be understood as not a gainer for that purpose.
